systems.system_notes: All-suture anchor platform for rotator cuff and soft-tissue fixation with both standard and knotless variants.

trays.tray_notes: Official Smith+Nephew materials describe dedicated insertion instrumentation and preparation workflow for the Q-FIX anchor family.

components.component_notes: Official Smith+Nephew materials describe the Q-FIX all-suture anchor construct used for soft-tissue fixation.
Official Smith+Nephew materials describe the knotless variant within the Q-FIX family.
Official product materials describe prepared insertion workflow using dedicated guides and instrumentation.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current public Smith+Nephew pages define the anchor families and insertion workflow but do not expose a full coded item table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure, IFU, or ordering guide pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and component-family level.
